channel.title: A few questions from a new user!
channel.description:
Question 1: am I able to make a website editable? -> Like edit the headlines, other text, images, if so, please link me some kind of tutorial.
Question 2: Could this be possible on wordpress.com? The website I am building is for someone that uses wordpress.com as their hosting, again if so, please link me with some kind of tutorial or blog post where I learn about this.
Question 3: Is this all possible on the same domain, or do I really need to host the actual website on some other hosting? Or can this all be done just with wordpress.com?
Please let me know! Thanks in advance.

item.title: A few questions from a new user!
item.dc:creator: appevolver2022
item.description:
Whatever content u update on Wordpress, that same content will be shown on Frontity.
Obviously, you need domain and Node hosting provider

Read full topic
item.source: A few questions from a new user!

item.title: A few questions from a new user!
item.dc:creator: tomwuijsterdev
item.description:
Question 1: am I able to make a website editable?
→ Like edit the headlines, other text, images, if so, please link me some kind of tutorial.

Question 2: Could this be possible on wordpress.com? The website I am building is for someone that uses wordpress.com as their hosting, again if so, please link me with some kind of tutorial or blog post where I learn about this.

Question 3: Is this all possible on the same domain, or do I really need to host the actual website on some other hosting? Or can this all be done just with wordpress.com?

Please let me know!
Thanks in advance.

Read full topic
item.source: A few questions from a new user!
